name: Dynamics 365 WFM
description: Primary workforce management module: real-time force-to-load ratios, schedule adherence, agent availability, shift coverage, and 6-week forecast modeling by 15-minute interval.

name: Dynamics 365 Historical Analytics
description: Multi-year call volume history, seasonal pattern modeling, forecast accuracy tracking, and workforce trend analysis. Provides the 3-year tax season baseline data.

name: Snowflake Data Warehouse
description: Deep historical data lake for long-range forecasting. Stores 5+ years of call volume, handle time, and staffing actuals. Powers the multi-year overlay forecasts.

name: HR System
description: Agent headcount, attrition records, new hire onboarding status, overtime approvals, PTO tracking, and payroll cost data. Source of truth for budget impact modeling.

name: Dynamics 365 Quality Management
description: Agent quality scores, knowledge base adherence rates, process adherence reports, and new hire ramp tracking. Used to assess when the training cohort is ready for peak deployment.

name: Marketing Cloud
description: Campaign calendar and promotion schedule. Cross-referenced with volume forecasts to predict campaign-driven spikes before they impact staffing — preventing the advance-notice gap that caused the auto loan spike.

name: Microsoft Fabric
description: Tenant-specific unified data analytics platform fed by CCAS. Hosts the historical data lake, Power BI foundation, and AI/ML model registry. Radiant intelligence layer queries Fabric for enriched cross-source correlation.

name: Variant WFM / Call Recording
description: Workforce management schedules, force-to-load ratios, agent shift state, call recording metadata, and call reason codes (first/second reason). Critical for correlating staffing state with queue performance during incidents.

name: Voice Bio System
description: Voice authentication enrollment, biometric match confidence, fraud detection flags. Feeds the agent authentication-mode indicator and fallback verification triggers when PinDrop degrades.

name: PinDrop
description: Call authentication scoring, spoofing detection, ANI reputation, carrier intelligence, geo-risk signals. Critical for identifying security posture changes during SIP path degradation.

name: Carrier Intelligence
description: SIP path health, carrier status feeds, fiber/circuit incident reports, and estimated recovery timelines. Enables root-cause identification for infrastructure-driven service degradation.

name: Dynamics 365 IVR / Self-Service
description: Real-time intent capture, self-service completion rates by intent, containment metrics, transfer-out reason codes. Feeds top-intent indicators across all dashboard tiers and powers the IVR template hot-swap path.
